name: Chicken Breasts with Eggplant and Roasted Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh herbs, such as thyme or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. To Roast Peppers: Place the peppers on the grill or under the broiler, turning them occasionally until charred all over and nearly black.
2. Remove the peppers from the heat and place them in a plastic bag to steam off the skin. When cool enough to handle, remove the charred skin and seeds.
3. Preheat the grill or broiler. Halve the eggplants and score them in 2 or 3 places. Brush with some of the oil and place on the grill, cut side towards the heat.
4. Turn the eggplant after 5 minutes and cook until almost soft. Add the chicken breasts and cook for an additional 3 minutes on each side until cooked through.
5. Remove the chicken and eggplant to a plate. Heat the remaining oil in a large frying pan until hot.
6. Add the onion and garlic, cooking until softened.
7. Puree the roasted peppers and vinegar in a food processor or blender until smooth.
8. Return the puree, eggplant, and chicken to the frying pan and heat together for about 5 minutes.
9. Serve the chicken mixture on a platter surrounded by the eggplant and sauce. Sprinkle with the fresh herbs.
Yield: 4 servings
